Manhwa_updates en X: "The Spark in Your Eyes / Blinded by the Setting Sun/ 저무는 해, 시린 눈 APPEARS TO HAVE FINISHED ITS SIDE STORY with PART 4 EPISODE. It will be back with a review. Sad to see another great manhwa end. #manhwa #TheSparkInYourEyes https://t.co/NxZ13SZZ53" / X
nat⛤ en X: "i love whatever these type of characters are called https://t.co/SK3ila8N5T" / X
nyl en X: "That's a wrap on the August 2025 Animation Challenge: Summer Send-off Edition! This is our biggest one yet with a hand-full of newcomers, including our first 2D animator. Give it up for our participants: @AlenAbyssFW @Cerbskies @DegenSinful @futuretist @Heracle3DX https://t.co/fj6EXBTio4" / X
